caption: A man with gray, spiked hair, glasses, and headphones is seated in a room decorated with framed photographs and clothing. He wears a white button-down shirt, a red bowtie, and suspenders. A professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him. In the background, another person wearing a dark shirt and jeans is partially visible, moving behind the main subject. The scene features recurring on-screen logos and text, including "ESTALID PODCAST" and "SS TALK JOT." Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated and maintains a similar expression, while the person in the background shifts their position slightly. The camera remains static, capturing the man from the chest up as he appears to be speaking or listening during a recording session.
